Oak Spring Garden Foundation
Taxonomic Inventory
Last Update: 5.27.2026
Total Taxa Registered: 2378
You are viewing the Oak Spring Garden Foundation (OSGF) Taxonomic Inventory. These are records of organisms that have been observed on property through various biodiversity monitoring methods. Use the dynamic search filter below to query records by kingdom, phylum, class, scientific name, or common name. Records with a dark green border signify physical collection assets preserved and available for viewing. Please reach out to the Native Plant Team if you would like to view any of the physical records. Please note that this list is updated regularly and may fluctuate with changes in taxonomy and with the Native Plant Team's understanding of what species are present on site.
